scripts.build: astro build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='.vercel/output/functions/_render.func/.vc-config.json';if(fs.existsSync(p)){const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));c.runtime='nodejs20.x';fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(c,null,2));console.log('Patched runtime to nodejs20.x');}"
